title: Bold, italics, and underline
drDigitalIntro:
You can change how your words look to add emphasis.
• Select some text first.
• Ctrl+B makes it bold; Ctrl+I makes it italic; Ctrl+U underlines it.
• Same pattern: Ctrl plus the first letter of what you want.
drDigitalSuccess: Bold, italic, underline — now your writing can stand out!
drDigitalHint: Read through the three formatting shortcuts, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
